# Iwo

**Summary**: A metaheuristic algorithm inspired by the behavior of invasive weeds to solve optimization problems.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2013-ahmed|AHMED, 2013]] utilized IWO to optimize surfactant-polymer flooding parameters and well placement.

## Instruments and Software



## Typical Workflow



## Key Results and Findings

- IWO showed higher NPV values than DE in several cases but resulted in lower UR values in some realizations compared to CMAES. ([[2013-ahmed|AHMED, 2013, p. 122]])
